tasks.description: Initialize Mastra service in the monorepo with pnpm create mastra, restructure for monorepo layout.
steps: Run `pnpm create mastra@latest` in a temp directory to scaffold, then move relevant files into `mastra/` in the monorepo root
Ensure `mastra/package.json` has correct dependencies: `@mastra/core`, `@mastra/drizzle`, `drizzle-orm`, `drizzle-kit`, `pg`
Add `mastra/tsconfig.json` extending the project conventions
Add `mastra/.env.example` with `DATABASE_URL=postgresql://...` and `OPENAI_API_KEY`
Verify `pnpm install` works from the monorepo root
tasks.verify: cd mastra && pnpm install && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20

tasks.description: Create Drizzle schema for agents table matching the frontend Agent interface.
steps: Create `mastra/src/db/schema.ts` with a `agents` table using Drizzle's `pgTable`

Columns: `id` (uuid, pk, default gen), `name` (varchar 100, not null), `description` (text), `instructions` (text, not null), `category` (varchar 50), `tags` (json array), `color` (varchar 7), `icon` (varchar 50), `voice_id` (varchar), `preset_voice` (varchar), `stt_provider` (varchar), `llm_provider` (varchar), `tts_provider` (varchar), `tts_engine` (varchar), `tts_cloud_provider` (varchar), `llm_model` (varchar), `is_online` (boolean, default true), `voice_name` (varchar), `call_count` (integer, default 0), `created_at` (timestamp, default now), `updated_at` (timestamp, default now)
Create `mastra/src/db/index.ts` — Drizzle client init with `DATABASE_URL`
Create `mastra/drizzle.config.ts` for migrations
Generate initial migration with `pnpm drizzle-kit generate`

tasks.description: Create agent CRUD service and REST routes in the Mastra service.
steps: Create `mastra/src/agents/agent-crud.ts` — functions: `listAgents(params?)`, `getAgent(id)`, `createAgent(data)`, `updateAgent(id, data)`, `deleteAgent(id)`
Use Drizzle queries against the agents table
Support filtering by `category` and `search` (ILIKE on name/description)
Create `mastra/src/routes/agents.ts` — Express/Hono routes: GET /api/agents, GET /api/agents/:id, POST /api/agents, PUT /api/agents/:id, DELETE /api/agents/:id
Wire routes into the Mastra server entry point

tasks.description: Add agents module to NestJS backend that proxies CRUD to the Mastra service.
steps: Create `backend/src/agents/agents.module.ts`
Create `backend/src/agents/agents.service.ts` — HttpService calls to Mastra service at `MASTRA_URL` (default http://localhost:4111)
Create `backend/src/agents/agents.controller.ts` — REST endpoints: GET /agents, GET /agents/:id, POST /agents, PUT /agents/:id, DELETE /agents/:id
Create `backend/src/agents/dto/create-agent.dto.ts` and `update-agent.dto.ts` with validation
Import `AgentsModule` in `app.module.ts`
Add `MASTRA_URL` to `backend/.env.example`

tasks.description: Replace mock API client with real backend calls for agent CRUD.
steps: Rewrite `ui-web/src/lib/api.ts` — remove all mock data, replace with real fetch calls to the backend `/agents` endpoints
Keep the same method signatures: `listAgents`, `getAgent`, `getAgentName`
Add `createAgent(data)`, `updateAgent(id, data)`, `deleteAgent(id)` methods
Ensure error handling matches existing patterns

tasks.description: Add Create/Edit Agent dialog to the Agents page.
steps: Create `ui-web/src/components/agents/agent-form-dialog.tsx` — modal form for creating/editing agents
Fields: name, description, instructions (textarea), category (select), color (preset picker), icon, LLM model, voice config
Reuse existing shadcn Dialog, Input, Select, Textarea components
Wire 'Create Agent' button on agents page to open the dialog
On submit: call `api.createAgent()` or `api.updateAgent()`, refresh the agent list
Add edit button to `AgentCard` that opens the dialog in edit mode

tasks.description: Add delete agent functionality with confirmation.
steps: Add delete button to agent detail page (`ui-web/src/app/agents/[id]/page.tsx`)
Show confirmation dialog before deleting
Call `api.deleteAgent(id)`, redirect to agents list on success
Optionally add delete to the agent card dropdown menu

tasks.description: Make arena setup Step 1 functional — fetch real agents and allow selection.
steps: In `ui-web/src/app/arena/page.tsx` Step 1, fetch agents from `api.listAgents()` on mount
For 'agents' config mode: render selectable agent cards from the real agent list
Track selected agents in state as `selectedAgents: Agent[]`
For 'manual' config mode: allow typing agent name + instructions (existing UI shell)
Require at least 2 agents selected to proceed to Step 2
In `handleStartConversation`: pass selected agents as `nativeAgents` with `name` and `instructions` to `createSession()`

tasks.description: Create a seed script that populates the database with default test agents.
steps: Create `mastra/src/scripts/seed.ts`
Insert 4 agents: Atlas (technical/research), Nova (creative), Sage (conversational), Debate Bot (debate/argumentation)
Each agent has meaningful instructions, category, color, icon
Add `seed` script to `mastra/package.json`: `tsx src/scripts/seed.ts`
Ensure idempotent — skip if agents with same names exist

tasks.description: Add PostgreSQL to docker-compose.staging.yml and update env examples.
steps: Add `postgres` service to `docker-compose.staging.yml`: image postgres:16-alpine, volume for data, env for POSTGRES_DB/USER/PASSWORD
Add `mastra` service to `docker-compose.staging.yml`: build from `mastra/`, depends_on postgres, DATABASE_URL pointing to the postgres service
Update `backend` service: add `MASTRA_URL=http://mastra:4111` environment
Update `.env.staging.example` with DATABASE_URL and MASTRA_URL
Create `mastra/Dockerfile`
